Global (All).title: US-China trade tensions escalate as Pelosi visits Taiwan
Global (All).summary: The US House Speaker's visit to Taiwan has exacerbated tensions between Washington and Beijing, sparking concerns over a potential conflict.

Global (All).title: Ransomware attack hits US pipeline operator
Global (All).summary: A prominent US pipeline operator has been hit by a ransomware attack, raising concerns over the disruption of critical infrastructure.

Global (All).title: Protests erupt in Peru over presidential election result
Global (All).summary: Opposition groups in Peru have taken to the streets, contesting the outcome of a recent presidential election, sparking concerns over political stability.

United States.title: Ransomware Attack Hits US Healthcare System
United States.summary: 'Criminal actor' blamed for attack on 2 major US health systems amid 'significant' data breaches; Experts warn patients to beware phishing emails as hackers continue to exploit vulnerabilities in software and people.

United States.title: Supreme Court Strikes Down Roe v. Wade, Sparking Widespread Protests Across US
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade has sparked protests and demonstrations across the US, resulting in multiple arrests and concerns about civil unrest and social stability.

United States.title: Multiple Shooting Incidents in US Cities Amid Debate Over Gun Control
United States.summary: 'Gun violence is an epidemic in America': Mass shootings reported in multiple US cities, including New York City, Chicago, and Los Angeles, as policymakers call for stronger gun control laws to prevent further tragedies.

South Korea.summary: North Korea fires unidentified projectile into Sea of Japan amid heightened tensions in region.

South Korea.title: Anti-Government Protests Continue in South Korea Amid Economic Woes
South Korea.summary: Anti-government protests continue in South Korea's capital, Seoul, as citizens express discontent over economic woes and inflation concerns.
South Korea to impose temporary controls on exports of key materials for chip production in response to US and South Korean industry complaints.

Japan.title: North Korea fires two ballistic missiles into the Sea of Japan
Japan.summary: Tensions between North Korea and Japan have increased due to recent missile tests.

Japan.title: Japan's COVID-19 hospitalizations hit record daily high
Japan.summary: Japan's healthcare system is facing increasing pressure due to a rise in COVID-19 cases.

Japan.title: Japanese lawmakers push for more restrictive COVID-19 measures
Japan.summary: Government officials in Japan are discussing stricter measures to combat the spread of COVID-19.
